what_it_does: This file is a metadata record (YAML frontmatter only) for a channel attachment that links attachment att-969c2ee5 in the dragnet-development channel to a board item via a board:// URI and records the attachment type and creation timestamp.
observations: Only YAML frontmatter is present; there is no body content.
The added timestamp is a UTC ISO-8601 value with timezone offset.
No code symbols are defined in the file.
standouts: It functions as a cross-reference ledger entry between a channel attachment and a board item.
The target uses a board:// URI scheme.
It contains no payload content beyond the linkage metadata.
conventions: Uses id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
References an external entity with a URI-style identifier (board://...).
Timestamps are recorded in UTC ISO-8601 format.
concerns: The file provides no context about the board item or the attachment content.
The referenced board item is not present in this file, so the link cannot be verified locally.
There is no indication of author, status, or lifecycle beyond the added timestamp.
notes: A metadata stub that records a dragnet-development channel attachment pointing to board item item-1a8af41a.
questions: What content or purpose does board item item-1a8af41a represent?
What does attachment_type board_items imply about the relationship semantics?
Who or what process created this attachment record?
Is the referenced board item still current and valid?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — the file is a metadata attachment record and it records the expected linkage, type, and timestamp.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a durable, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a specific board item so the attachment can be located or understood in board context.
novelty: Uses a board:// URI scheme to reference a board item, which is a domain-specific addressing convention.
contribution: Provides a machine-readable, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a board item, supporting lookup and audit of the attachment's board context.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record in the dragnet-development channel of type board_items, linking attachment att-969c2ee5 to board item item-1a8af41a and recording when the association was added.
intention_for_embedding: To record that this channel attachment refers to a specific board item and to preserve the time at which that association was created.
